title: Australian Meat Pie
description: A classic Aussie comfort food, perfect for a cold evening. This recipe is a simplified version of a traditional Australian meat pie.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C and line a baking tray with parchment paper.
Roll out the flaky pastry to a thickness of about 3mm.
Cut out circles of pastry using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of pork mince in the centre of each pastry circle.
Top the mince with a spoonful of sweet potato mash and a sprinkle of onion and garlic.
Brush the edges of the pastry with a little water and fold the pastry in half to enclose the filling.
Press the edges together to seal the pie and use a fork to crimp the edge.
Place the pies on the prepared baking tray and brush the tops with a little milk.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is hot and bubbly.
